client_company: "Dr. Sweta Adatia / NeuroSense360"
client_name: "Dr. Sweta Adatia / NeuroSense360"
client_email: ""
title: "Neurosense Requirements Reference"

template_id: null

pricing_total: null
project: Proposals
---# Neurosense Requirements Reference

**Client:** Dr. Sweta Adatia / NeuroSense360
**Status:** draft  ·  **Created:** 2026-05-14

---

{
  "rawHtml": "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n<meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n<title>Neurosense Ecosystem — Requirements & Reference Document BTR-2026-NS-REF-01</title>\n<style>\n* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }\nbody { font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif; background: #e8e8e8; color: #1C2B4A; }\n.page { width: 210mm; height: 297mm; overflow: hidden; margin: 10px auto; background: white; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); display: flex; flex-direction: column; }\n@media print { body { background: white; } .page { margin: 0; box-shadow: none; page-break-after: always; } .page:last-child { page-break-after: avoid; } @page { size: A4; margin: 0; } }\n:root { --navy: #1C2B4A; --gold: #C9A93F; --text: #374151; --muted: #6B7280; --border: #E5E7EB; --bg: #F8F9FB; }\n.section-badge { font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3px; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 3px; }\n.section-heading { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 7px; line-height: 1.2; }\n.section-heading-sm { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 5px; }\n.body-content { padding: 14px 28px; }\n.divider { border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }\n.body-p { font-size: 9.5px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 5px; }\n.body-p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }\n.fn { font-size: 8.5px; color: var(--muted); font-style: italic; margin-top: 5px; line-height: 1.5; }\n.page-footer { margin-top: auto; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 5px 28px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: var(--bg); }\n.pf-left { font-size: 8px; color: var(--muted); }\n.pf-right { font-size: 8px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 600; }\n/* Cover */\n.cover { background: var(--navy); height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 44px 44px 36px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }\n.cover::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -80px; right: -80px; width: 360px; height: 360px; border-radius: 50%; border: 55px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }\n.cover::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -50px; right: 50px; width: 220px; height: 220px; border-radius: 50%; border: 44px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }\n.cover-accent { width: 44px; height: 3px; background: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 28px; }\n.cover-label { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 14px; }\n.cover-title { font-size: 25px; font-weight: 800; color: white; line-height: 1.18; margin-bottom: 14px; max-width: 500px; }\n.cover-subtitle { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); line-height: 1.7; max-width: 460px; }\n.cover-meta { margin-top: auto; display: flex; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding-top: 24px; }\n.cover-meta-col { flex: 1; padding-right: 16px; }\n.cover-meta-col + .cover-meta-col { border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding-left: 16px; padding-right: 0; }\n.cover-meta-label { font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2.5px; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 5px; }\n.cover-meta-name { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: white; margin-bottom: 3px; }\n.cover-meta-sub { font-size: 9px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); line-height: 1.5; }\n/* Platform header band */\n.plat-band { background: var(--navy); padding: 7px 28px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }\n.plat-badge { font-size: 7.5px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase; background: rgba(201,169,63,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,63,0.35); padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 3px; }\n.plat-title { font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 800; color: white; }\n.plat-url { margin-left: auto; font-size: 8px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); font-style: italic; }\n/* Req item */\n.req-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; }\n.req-item { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: flex-start; padding: 4px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }\n.req-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }\n.req-dot { width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--navy); color: white; font-size: 7.5px; font-weight: 700; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; }\n.req-dot.gold { background: var(--gold); }\n.req-title { font-size: 9.5px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 1px; }\n.req-desc { font-size: 8.5px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.45; }\n/* Two col */\n.two-col { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; }\n.three-col { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 7px; }\n/* Info cards */\n.info-card { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px; background: white; }\n.card-title { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 3px; }\n.card-desc { font-size: 8.5px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.45; }\n/* Tag row */\n.tag-row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; margin-top: 5px; }\n.tag { font-size: 8px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--navy); background: rgba(28,43,74,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(28,43,74,0.15); padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 3px; }\n.tag.gold { color: #92700a; background: rgba(201,169,63,0.12); border-color: rgba(201,169,63,0.35); }\n.tag.green { color: #166534; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); border-color: rgba(34,197,94,0.3); }\n.tag.red { color: #991b1b; background: rgba(220,38,38,0.08); border-color: rgba(220,38,38,0.25); }\n/* Prob band */\n.prob-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-top: 6px; }\n.prob-card { flex: 1; border-radius: 6px; padding: 7px 9px; border: 1px solid; }\n.prob-card.high { background: rgba(220,38,38,0.06); border-color: rgba(220,38,38,0.25); }\n.prob-card.mod  { background: rgba(234,179,8,0.06);  border-color: rgba(234,179,8,0.3); }\n.prob-card.low  { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.06);  border-color: rgba(34,197,94,0.25); }\n.prob-pct { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 1px; }\n.high .prob-pct { color: #dc2626; }\n.mod  .prob-pct { color: #ca8a04; }\n.low  .prob-pct { color: #16a34a; }\n.prob-lbl { font-size: 7.5px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 2px; }\n.prob-items { font-size: 8px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.4; }\n/* Lead quote */\n.lead-quote { border-left: 3px solid var(--gold); padding: 8px 11px; background: var(--bg); border-radius: 0 5px 5px 0; margin: 7px 0; font-size: 9.5px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--text); }\n/* Action table */\n.action-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 6px; font-size: 8.5px; }\n.action-table th { background: var(--navy); color: white; padding: 5px 8px; text-align: left; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px; }\n.action-table td { padding: 4px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); vertical-align: top; line-height: 1.4; }\n.action-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }\n.action-table td.owner { font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); white-space: nowrap; }\n.action-table td.due { color: var(--gold); font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; }\n/* Ref app box */\n.ref-app { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 7px; overflow: hidden; }\n.ref-app-header { background: var(--navy); padding: 7px 11px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }\n.ref-app-name { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; color: white; }\n.ref-app-url { font-size: 8.5px; color: var(--gold); margin-left: auto; }\n.ref-app-body { padding: 8px 11px; }\n/* Feature mini-list */\n.mini-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; }\n.mini-list li { font-size: 8.5px; color: var(--text); padding: 2px 0 2px 10px; position: relative; line-height: 1.45; }\n.mini-list li::before { content: '\\25B6'; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--gold); font-size: 6.5px; top: 4px; }\n/* Footer band */\n.footer-band { background: var(--navy); padding: 12px 28px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }\n.footer-left .f-email { font-size: 9px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-top: 3px; }\n.footer-center { font-size: 9px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); text-align: center; }\n.footer-right { text-align: right; }\n.footer-right .f-client { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gold); }\n.footer-right .f-address { font-size: 9px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-top: 2px; line-height: 1.4; }\n.footer-confidential { background: #111d35; padding: 4px 28px; font-size: 7.5px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 2.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); text-align: center; text-transform: uppercase; }\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<!-- ══ PAGE 1 — COVER ══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"cover\">\n    \n    <div class=\"cover-accent\"></div>\n    <div class=\"cover-label\">Business Requirements &amp; Reference Analysis Document</div>\n    <div class=\"cover-title\">Neurosense Ecosystem — Detailed Requirements, Reference Applications &amp; Meeting Decisions</div>\n    <div class=\"cover-subtitle\">Based on the project meeting of 20 April 2026. Covers Neuro360Q clinical qEEG platform, LimitlessBrainCare consumer portal, and AI Brain Coach — with full reference analysis of Axon EEG Solutions and EEG Data Hub.</div>\n    <div style=\"margin-top: 24px; display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap:wrap;\">\n      <div style=\"background: rgba(201,169,63,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,63,0.3); border-radius: 4px; padding: 5px 13px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: 1.5px;\">3 PLATFORMS</div>\n      <div style=\"background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 4px; padding: 5px 13px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); letter-spacing: 1.5px;\">2 REFERENCE APPS ANALYSED</div>\n      <div style=\"background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 4px; padding: 5px 13px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); letter-spacing: 1.5px;\">INTERNAL WORKING DOCUMENT</div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"cover-meta\">\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Client</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">Dr. Shweta</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">Neurosense &amp; Limitless Brain Lab<br>Clinical Neuroscience Platform</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Prepared By</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">Bettroi FZE</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">admin@bettroi.com<br>bettroi.com</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Reference</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">BTR-2026-NS-REF-01</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">20 April 2026<br>Internal / Confidential<br>6 Pages</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Meeting Date</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\" style=\"color: var(--gold); font-size: 15px;\">20 Apr 2026</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">Stakeholders: Dr. Shweta<br>Haritha, Komal, Akshita<br>BT, BK</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══ PAGE 2 — REFERENCE APPLICATIONS ══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-bottom: 10px;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">Section 01 &mdash; Reference Applications</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Benchmarks for Neuro360Q Interface &amp; Workflow Design</div>\n    <p class=\"body-p\">Two platforms were identified as primary references for the Neuro360Q clinical interface. The engineering team is directed to study these systems before finalising the Neuro360Q UX and probability-calculation methodology.</p>\n\n    <div class=\"ref-app\" style=\"margin-bottom: 8px;\">\n      <div class=\"ref-app-header\">\n        <div class=\"plat-badge\">REF APP 01</div>\n        <div class=\"ref-app-name\">Axon EEG Solutions</div>\n        <div class=\"ref-app-url\">axoneegsolutions.com</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"ref-app-body\">\n        <div class=\"two-col\" style=\"gap: 10px;\">\n          <div>\n            <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px;\">Core Product</div>\n            <p class=\"body-p\" style=\"margin-bottom:4px;\"><strong>Neuro Performance Report (NPR)</strong> — a quantitative EEG analysis and reporting system providing clinically relevant insights into brain function using <em>qEEG+ technology</em> (translational neuroimaging). AAMP Medical Innovation Award Winner. Published in multiple peer-reviewed journals.</p>\n            <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 5px;\">Clinical Workflow</div>\n            <ul class=\"mini-list\">\n              <li>Step 1: Clinician connects with Axon EEG team</li>\n              <li>Step 2: Acquire approved EEG amplifier (Zeto, Brainmaster, Mitsar, Deymed)</li>\n              <li>Step 3: Submit EDF recording via EEGDataHub secure portal</li>\n              <li>Step 4: Receive Neuro Performance Report within <strong>72 hours</strong></li>\n            </ul>\n            <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 5px;\">File Formats</div>\n            <ul class=\"mini-list\">\n              <li>Input: <strong>.EDF / EDF+</strong> (European Data Format)</li>\n              <li>Output: Structured clinical PDF report (NPR)</li>\n              <li>Processing: Axon Wave App converts EDF to clean tracings + topographic maps</li>\n            </ul>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px;\">Clinical Conditions Covered</div>\n            <div class=\"tag-row\">\n              <span class=\"tag\">ADHD</span><span class=\"tag\">Autism Spectrum</span><span class=\"tag\">Mood Disorders</span><span class=\"tag\">Anxiety</span><span class=\"tag\">TBI</span><span class=\"tag\">Concussion</span><span class=\"tag\">Addiction</span><span class=\"tag\">Sleep Dysregulation</span><span class=\"tag\">Suicide Ideation</span><span class=\"tag\">Violent Behavior</span><span class=\"tag\">Cognitive Performance</span><span class=\"tag\">Learning Difficulties</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 6px;\">Report Outputs</div>\n            <ul class=\"mini-list\">\n              <li>Spectral topographic maps (2D scalp distribution)</li>\n              <li>Neurophysiological marker identification</li>\n              <li>Treatment guidance: medication, neurofeedback, neuromodulation</li>\n              <li>Identifies stimulant responders before prescribing</li>\n              <li>Cognitive slowing, neurotransmitter imbalance detection</li>\n            </ul>\n            <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 6px;\">Clinical Language Style</div>\n            <ul class=\"mini-list\">\n              <li>\"Objective neurophysiological markers\" — not symptom-based</li>\n              <li>\"Psychiatry is the only specialty that doesn't test the organ it treats\"</li>\n              <li>\"qEEG+ changes that paradigm\" — precision mental health framing</li>\n              <li>Data-driven, evidence-based, peer-reviewed positioning</li>\n            </ul>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"ref-app\">\n      <div class=\"ref-app-header\">\n        <div class=\"plat-badge\">REF APP 02</div>\n        <div class=\"ref-app-name\">EEG Data Hub</div>\n        <div class=\"ref-app-url\">eegdatahub.com</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"ref-app-body\">\n        <div class=\"two-col\" style=\"gap: 10px;\">\n          <div>\n            <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px;\">Role in Ecosystem</div>\n            <p class=\"body-p\">EEG Data Hub is the <strong>secure data transmission and processing platform</strong> through which clinicians submit EDF recordings to Axon EEG Solutions and receive processed reports back. It is effectively the backend portal / data pipeline layer between in-office EEG recording and the specialist analysis team.</p>\n            <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 5px;\">Key Functions (from app metadata)</div>\n            <ul class=\"mini-list\">\n              <li>Data Processing and Analysis</li>\n              <li>Visualization and Reporting</li>\n              <li>Advanced Analytics</li>\n              <li>Compliance and Security</li>\n              <li>User Interface and Experience</li>\n            </ul>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px;\">Engineering Notes</div>\n            <ul class=\"mini-list\">\n              <li>React SPA — all content rendered client-side (no public API docs)</li>\n              <li>Positioned as \"the first of its kind\" data hub for EEG transmission</li>\n              <li>Neuro360Q should replicate this <strong>Upload → Queue → Download</strong> workflow</li>\n              <li>Interface must be minimal and clinician-grade — not consumer-facing</li>\n            </ul>\n            <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 6px;\">Reverse Engineering Target (Action Item BT &amp; BK)</div>\n            <ul class=\"mini-list\">\n              <li>Study HEVA AI probability-calculation approach</li>\n              <li>Study EEG Data Hub / Axon EEG for probability score architecture</li>\n              <li>Propose biomarker-to-disease correlation methodology</li>\n              <li>Target: proposal within 2 weeks of meeting (by 4 May 2026)</li>\n            </ul>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"pf-left\">BTR-2026-NS-REF-01 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Internal Document &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE</div>\n    <div class=\"pf-right\">Page 2 of 6</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══ PAGE 3 — NEURO360Q REQUIREMENTS ══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"plat-band\">\n    <div class=\"plat-badge\">Platform 01</div>\n    <div class=\"plat-title\">Neuro360Q — Clinical qEEG Probability Platform</div>\n    <div class=\"plat-url\">Separate domain &middot; Doctor-facing &middot; Distinct from consumer Neurosense branding</div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-top: 10px; padding-bottom: 8px;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">Context from Meeting</div>\n    <div class=\"lead-quote\">\"Upload EDF file, download the QEEG report. Along with the report, there is an addendum called 'Probabilities for Brain / Neurodegenerative Diseases.' Based on this patient's QEEG, there is a high probability (more than 70%) that this patient will develop this condition, and a low probability for the following.\" — Dr. Shweta</div>\n\n    <ul class=\"req-list\">\n      <li class=\"req-item\">\n        <div class=\"req-dot\">R1</div>\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"req-title\">Interface Paradigm — Upload &rarr; Process &rarr; Download</div>\n          <div class=\"req-desc\">Clinician-grade one-page web interface. Neurologist/psychiatrist uploads EDF/EDF+ file. System processes in background queue. Clinician downloads (a) Neuro Performance Report (NPR) and (b) Probabilistic Neurodegenerative Disease Addendum (PNDA). Modelled on Axon EEG / EEG Data Hub workflow. No consumer UI elements. Separate branding from Neurosense360.</div>\n        </div>\n      </li>\n      <li class=\"req-item\">\n        <div class=\"req-dot\">R2</div>\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"req-title\">EDF Ingestion &amp; Signal Preprocessing <span style=\"font-size:8px; font-weight:700; color:#16a34a; background:rgba(34,197,94,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3); padding:1px 6px; border-radius:3px; margin-left:5px;\">CLONED FROM LBL</span></div>\n          <div class=\"req-desc\">Already built for the Limitless Brain Lab project. To be cloned and reconfigured. Covers: EDF/EDF+ validation, electrode label normalisation (10-20 system), montage re-referencing, bandpass filtering (0.5–70 Hz), notch filter (50/60 Hz), ICA artefact rejection, epoch segmentation.</div>\n        </div>\n      </li>\n      <li class=\"req-item\">\n        <div class=\"req-dot\">R3</div>\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"req-title\">qEEG Feature Extraction Engine <span style=\"font-size:8px; font-weight:700; color:#16a34a; background:rgba(34,197,94,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3); padding:1px 6px; border-radius:3px; margin-left:5px;\">CLONED FROM LBL</span></div>\n          <div class=\"req-desc\">Already built for LBL. To be adapted for neurodegenerative biomarker profiling. Computes: absolute/relative band-power (delta 0.5–4 Hz, theta 4–8 Hz, alpha 8–13 Hz, beta 13–30 Hz, gamma 30–70 Hz), peak alpha frequency (PAF), theta/alpha ratio (TAR), frontal delta asymmetry, inter-hemispheric coherence matrices, topographic mapping.</div>\n        </div>\n      </li>\n      <li class=\"req-item\">\n        <div class=\"req-dot\">R4</div>\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"req-title\">Neuro Performance Report (NPR) — Clinical PDF</div>\n          <div class=\"req-desc\">Structured clinical PDF: spectral topographic maps, quantitative band-power tables per electrode, coherence visualisation, neurophysiological interpretation annotations, treatment modality recommendations (pharmacotherapy, neurofeedback candidacy, neuromodulation referral). Per-clinic letterhead/logo support. Full medical terminology — no consumer language.</div>\n        </div>\n      </li>\n      <li class=\"req-item\">\n        <div class=\"req-dot gold\">R5</div>\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"req-title\">Probabilistic Neurodegenerative Disease Addendum (PNDA) — Core Deliverable</div>\n          <div class=\"req-desc\">Separate addendum appended to the NPR. Lists probability-stratified risk for each target condition. Output is a directional range (decision support) — NOT a binary diagnosis. Explicit clinical disclaimer mandatory on every output. Model must account for age variability and outliers.</div>\n        </div>\n      </li>\n    </ul>\n\n    <div class=\"prob-row\">\n      <div class=\"prob-card high\">\n        <div class=\"prob-pct\">&gt; 70%</div>\n        <div class=\"prob-lbl\">High Probability</div>\n        <div class=\"prob-items\">Alzheimer's / Dementia<br>Parkinson's Disease<br>Schizophrenia Spectrum<br>Major Depressive Disorder<br>Generalised Anxiety Disorder</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"prob-card mod\">\n        <div class=\"prob-pct\">50–70%</div>\n        <div class=\"prob-lbl\">Moderate Probability</div>\n        <div class=\"prob-items\">Partial concordance with known qEEG correlates. Longitudinal monitoring and clinical correlation advised.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"prob-card low\">\n        <div class=\"prob-pct\">&lt; 50%</div>\n        <div class=\"prob-lbl\">Low Probability</div>\n        <div class=\"prob-items\">Neurophysiological markers do not meet threshold criteria for this condition at present. Routine monitoring per clinical judgement.</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <ul class=\"req-list\" style=\"margin-top: 6px;\">\n      <li class=\"req-item\">\n        <div class=\"req-dot\">R6</div>\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"req-title\">Clinician Portal &amp; Case Archive</div>\n          <div class=\"req-desc\">Case history, report archive, per-patient longitudinal comparison, labelled-dataset ingestion admin for model retraining. Role-based access: clinician view vs. super admin view.</div>\n        </div>\n      </li>\n    </ul>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"pf-left\">BTR-2026-NS-REF-01 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Internal Document &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE</div>\n    <div class=\"pf-right\">Page 3 of 6</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══ PAGE 4 — PROBABILITY MODEL ARCHITECTURE ══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-bottom: 10px;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">Platform 01 Continued &mdash; AI Biomarker Correlation Engine</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Probability Model — How It Works (As Discussed in Meeting)</div>\n\n    <div class=\"lead-quote\">\"We don't know how the probability has to be calculated. What she is saying is that for us to train the model, she will give QEEG data and the clinical confirmation — this patient is perfectly normal, this patient has a high chance of dementia. Based on that, we have to do some correlation, or use AI research to figure out how we correlate between QEEG signals and neurodegenerative diseases.\" — Meeting, 20 Apr 2026</div>\n\n    <div class=\"two-col\" style=\"margin-top: 8px; gap: 10px;\">\n      <div>\n        <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 4px;\">Stage 1 — Literature-Anchored Biomarker Map</div>\n        <ul class=\"mini-list\">\n          <li>AI-assisted extraction of validated qEEG disease correlates from PubMed / IEEE indexed literature</li>\n          <li><strong>Alzheimer's / Dementia:</strong> elevated frontal theta power, reduced posterior alpha, slowing of peak alpha frequency (PAF), increased delta/theta ratio</li>\n          <li><strong>Parkinson's Disease:</strong> reduced beta band coherence, frontal alpha asymmetry, increased resting-state delta in motor cortex</li>\n          <li><strong>Schizophrenia:</strong> reduced gamma coherence, increased delta/theta, abnormal P300 correlates</li>\n          <li><strong>Major Depressive Disorder:</strong> frontal alpha asymmetry (left &gt; right), reduced beta power, theta hyperactivity</li>\n          <li><strong>MCI (Mild Cognitive Impairment):</strong> PAF slowing, posterior alpha suppression, theta/alpha ratio elevation</li>\n        </ul>\n      </div>\n      <div>\n        <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 4px;\">Stage 2 — Supervised ML on Labelled Dataset</div>\n        <ul class=\"mini-list\">\n          <li>Dr. Shweta provides: EDF recordings + confirmed clinical diagnosis labels</li>\n          <li>Target: <strong>10–15 validated cases per disease class</strong> to seed training</li>\n          <li>Diagnosis classes: (i) Neurologically normal, (ii) Alzheimer's / dementia, (iii) Parkinson's, (iv) Schizophrenia spectrum, (v) Major depressive disorder</li>\n          <li>Model: gradient-boosted classifier (XGBoost) with Platt scaling for calibrated probabilities</li>\n          <li>Features: extracted spectral indices from R3 (band-power, PAF, coherence, TAR)</li>\n          <li>Train on majority (10), validate on held-out (5) per class</li>\n          <li>Iterative retraining as annotated corpus grows — self-improving</li>\n          <li>Must account for age variability and clinical outliers</li>\n        </ul>\n        <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 4px; margin-top: 6px;\">Reverse Engineering Targets</div>\n        <ul class=\"mini-list\">\n          <li>HEVA AI — study probability-score methodology</li>\n          <li>Axon EEG / EEG Data Hub — study report structure and biomarker presentation</li>\n          <li>Owner: BT &amp; BK — proposal due 4 May 2026</li>\n        </ul>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 4px;\">Model Constraints &amp; Compliance Requirements</div>\n    <div class=\"three-col\">\n      <div class=\"info-card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Decision Support Only</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">All probability outputs are directional ranges for clinical decision support — not a medical diagnosis. Explicit disclaimer mandatory on every PNDA output. Clinical judgement supersedes model output.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"info-card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">HIPAA Alignment</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">EDF files and clinical labels stored in encrypted, access-controlled repositories. PHI never transmitted to external AI providers. De-identified data only used for model training.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"info-card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Model Versioning</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Every probability report must record which model version produced it. Audit trail of training data used. Client validation required before each new model version deployed to production.</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 4px;\">Client Data Requirements (Dr. Shweta's Team)</div>\n    <table class=\"action-table\">\n      <thead>\n        <tr><th>Item</th><th>Requirement</th><th>Due</th><th>Owner</th></tr>\n      </thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td>Labeled EDF dataset</td><td>10–15 EDF files per disease class, paired with confirmed clinical diagnosis. EDF/EDF+ format, 10-20 electrode labels. Metadata as CSV/JSON.</td><td class=\"due\">Before Week 3</td><td class=\"owner\">Dr. Sweta / Dr. Sheta</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Age band metadata</td><td>Patient age included in each labeled case to allow model to account for age variability in spectral features.</td><td class=\"due\">With dataset</td><td class=\"owner\">Dr. Sweta / Dr. Sheta</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Normal control cases</td><td>Minimum 10–15 neurologically normal EDF recordings as negative class for model training.</td><td class=\"due\">Before Week 3</td><td class=\"owner\">Dr. Sweta / Dr. Sheta</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <div class=\"tag-row\" style=\"margin-top: 8px;\">\n      <span style=\"font-size:8px; font-weight:700; color:var(--muted); margin-right:4px;\">Technology Stack:</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">Python / FastAPI</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">MNE-Python (EEG DSP)</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">XGBoost</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">scikit-learn</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">Platt Scaling</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">PostgreSQL</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">Supabase Storage (EDF)</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">Next.js (Portal)</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">Vercel</span>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"pf-left\">BTR-2026-NS-REF-01 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Internal Document &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE</div>\n    <div class=\"pf-right\">Page 4 of 6</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══ PAGE 5 — PLATFORM 2 + PLATFORM 3 ══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"plat-band\">\n    <div class=\"plat-badge\">Platform 02</div>\n    <div class=\"plat-title\">LimitlessBrainCare — Consumer Brain Health Portal</div>\n    <div class=\"plat-url\">care.limitlessbrainlab.com &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Consumer-facing &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Standalone new project</div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-top: 9px; padding-bottom: 9px;\">\n    <div class=\"two-col\" style=\"gap: 10px;\">\n      <div>\n        <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px;\">My Brain Checkup — Cognitive Assessment Battery</div>\n        <ul class=\"req-list\">\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\">\n            <div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R1</div>\n            <div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">Cognitive Task Battery</div><div class=\"req-desc\">Timed interactive tasks: psychomotor vigilance (mental speed), N-back / digit span (working memory), continuous performance test (sustained attention). Progressive difficulty with reaction-time measurement.</div></div>\n          </li>\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\">\n            <div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R2</div>\n            <div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">Age-Band Benchmarking (NOT exact brain age)</div><div class=\"req-desc\">Show result as age-band range, not a specific age number. Initial calibration against ~100-person validation cohort across age decades 20–70. Recruited and consented by client team.</div></div>\n          </li>\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\">\n            <div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R3</div>\n            <div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">D2C Funnel</div><div class=\"req-desc\">Checkup &rarr; Nootropic Recommendation &rarr; Neurosense Scan referral. Brain checkup is the primary top-of-funnel entry point for D2C customers.</div></div>\n          </li>\n        </ul>\n        <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 6px;\">Nootropic Recommendation Algorithm</div>\n        <ul class=\"req-list\">\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\">\n            <div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R4</div>\n            <div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">Deterministic Rule Engine (No ML initially)</div><div class=\"req-desc\">Rules provided by Dr. Shweta. Maps measured domains (sleep, cognition, mood, attention) to 6 core nutraceutical products with 1–3 formulation variants per domain. Coded as fixed rules — not a learning model. Outcome data collection hooks for future ML optimisation.</div></div>\n          </li>\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\">\n            <div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R5</div>\n            <div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">Shopify Integration</div><div class=\"req-desc\">Storefront API — map recommended products to Shopify SKUs. Direct-to-purchase flow. Post-purchase: verify payment and unlock meditation/frequency content locally.</div></div>\n          </li>\n        </ul>\n      </div>\n      <div>\n        <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px;\">Protocol Presentation Rules</div>\n        <ul class=\"req-list\">\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\">\n            <div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R6</div>\n            <div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">Full Protocol View — No Internal Labels</div><div class=\"req-desc\">Show the full combined prescriptive protocol to patients: neuro-breathing &rarr; meditation &rarr; sound therapy &rarr; mantra chanting, with durations. Do NOT expose internal labels P1/P2/P3 or L1/L2 to patients. Do not show P1-only partial views.</div></div>\n          </li>\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\">\n            <div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R7</div>\n            <div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">Local Content Hosting</div><div class=\"req-desc\">All meditation, frequency audio, and chanting content hosted locally on platform servers — not streamed from third-party. Content unlocked after confirmed purchase. Komal to share full folder with Haritha (within 48 hrs of meeting).</div></div>\n          </li>\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\">\n            <div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R8</div>\n            <div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">Coach Scheduling — Fixed Slots (Manual)</div><div class=\"req-desc\">External coaches provide fixed available days and times. Platform shows these as bookable slots. Manual process for now — calendar API integration deferred to a later phase.</div></div>\n          </li>\n        </ul>\n        <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-bottom: 3px; margin-top: 6px;\">Admin Requirements</div>\n        <ul class=\"req-list\">\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\">\n            <div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R9</div>\n            <div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">Super Admin Pending Approvals</div><div class=\"req-desc\">Clinic/partner onboarding approval queue. Distinguish clinic vs. partner type. Admin can update pricing manually. Report logo customisation per clinic.</div></div>\n          </li>\n        </ul>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <hr class=\"divider\">\n\n  <div class=\"plat-band\">\n    <div class=\"plat-badge\">Platform 03 / CR4</div>\n    <div class=\"plat-title\">AI Brain Coach Co-Pilot</div>\n    <div class=\"plat-url\">Additive CR into existing Neurosense360 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Cross-platform</div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-top: 9px; padding-bottom: 0;\">\n    <div class=\"lead-quote\" style=\"margin-bottom: 6px;\">\"The system will identify this particular patient, take their information, generate a QEEG report from a particular location, analyse it, and give an explanation. Like an AI coach telling them: 'Your report is so and so. These things are good. These things can be improved by 1, 2, 3, 4.'\" — Meeting, 20 Apr 2026</div>\n    <div class=\"two-col\" style=\"gap: 10px;\">\n      <div>\n        <ul class=\"req-list\">\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\"><div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R1</div><div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">Patient Identity Resolution</div><div class=\"req-desc\">Auto-identifies authenticated patient from session. No manual entry. Fetches latest qEEG report and scan data from existing platform storage.</div></div></li>\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\"><div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R2</div><div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">Plain-Language Coaching Explanation</div><div class=\"req-desc\">LLM generates: what is good, what needs attention, prioritised 1-2-3-4 intervention list (breathing, meditation, sound, nutraceuticals). No clinical jargon to patient.</div></div></li>\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\"><div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R3</div><div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">First-Line Explanation — Escalate Selectively</div><div class=\"req-desc\">Do NOT push every user to a human coach. Only escalate when clinical complexity warrants it. Coach handles routine explanations autonomously.</div></div></li>\n        </ul>\n      </div>\n      <div>\n        <ul class=\"req-list\">\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\"><div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R4</div><div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">PHI Compliance</div><div class=\"req-desc\">Strip patient identifiers before LLM invocation. Zero PHI to external provider. Full audit trail. HIPAA-aligned logging.</div></div></li>\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\"><div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R5</div><div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">LLM Provider</div><div class=\"req-desc\">Claude (Anthropic) or Gemini (Google). Provider-agnostic abstraction layer — switchable without re-engineering. LLM token costs billed at actuals.</div></div></li>\n          <li class=\"req-item\" style=\"padding: 3px 0;\"><div class=\"req-dot\" style=\"width:14px;height:14px;font-size:7px;\">R6</div><div><div class=\"req-title\" style=\"font-size:9px;\">Commercial (CR4)</div><div class=\"req-desc\">Fixed price AED 4,500 total. 10 working days. 50% on sign-off, 50% on go-live. Ref: BTR-2026-NS-03.</div></div></li>\n        </ul>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"pf-left\">BTR-2026-NS-REF-01 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Internal Document &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE</div>\n    <div class=\"pf-right\">Page 5 of 6</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══ PAGE 6 — DECISIONS + ACTION ITEMS + OPEN QUESTIONS ══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-bottom: 10px;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">Section 05 &mdash; Decisions Made in Meeting (20 Apr 2026)</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Agreed Direction</div>\n    <div class=\"three-col\" style=\"gap:7px;\">\n      <div class=\"info-card\"><div class=\"card-title\">Two Separate Public Products</div><div class=\"card-desc\">care.limitlessbrainlab.com (consumer) and Neuro360Q (clinician) are built as separate standalone platforms — not a single system.</div></div>\n      <div class=\"info-card\"><div class=\"card-title\">Nootropics: Deterministic Only</div><div class=\"card-desc\">Recommendation algorithm is coded rules from Dr. Shweta — no ML initially. Outcome data collected for future ML optimisation.</div></div>\n      <div class=\"info-card\"><div class=\"card-title\">Probability: Decision Support</div><div class=\"card-desc\">PNDA outputs are directional ranges — not binary diagnosis. Clinical judgement supersedes. Explicit disclaimer on every report.</div></div>\n      <div class=\"info-card\"><div class=\"card-title\">AI Coach: First-Line Only</div><div class=\"card-desc\">Co-pilot handles routine explanation autonomously. Escalate to human coach only when complexity warrants — not by default.</div></div>\n      <div class=\"info-card\"><div class=\"card-title\">Patient Reports: Full Protocol</div><div class=\"card-desc\">Show complete integrated protocol (breathing → meditation → sound → chant) with durations. Hide P1/P2/P3 and L1/L2 internal labels.</div></div>\n      <div class=\"info-card\"><div class=\"card-title\">Content: Local Hosting</div><div class=\"card-desc\">All meditation, frequency audio, and chanting content hosted locally on platform servers. Unlocked post-purchase. No third-party streaming.</div></div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <hr class=\"divider\">\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-top: 10px; padding-bottom: 10px;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">Section 06 &mdash; Action Items</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Owners &amp; Deadlines</div>\n    <table class=\"action-table\">\n      <thead>\n        <tr><th style=\"width:32%;\">Action</th><th>Detail</th><th style=\"width:16%;\">Owner</th><th style=\"width:12%;\">Due</th></tr>\n      </thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td>Reverse-engineer probability logic</td><td>Study HEVA AI and Axon EEG / EEG Data Hub interfaces. Propose biomarker-to-disease correlation approach and probability-score architecture.</td><td class=\"owner\">BT &amp; BK</td><td class=\"due\">4 May 2026</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Data collection plan for model training</td><td>Define required clinical features, minimum labeled-case counts per disease, EDF data format requirements, and HIPAA compliance steps.</td><td class=\"owner\">Dr. Sweta / Haritha</td><td class=\"due\">4 May 2026</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Provide labeled QEEG dataset</td><td>10–15 EDF recordings per disease class with confirmed clinical diagnosis labels (including neurologically normal controls).</td><td class=\"owner\">Dr. Sweta</td><td class=\"due\">ASAP</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Submit nootropic rule set</td><td>Deterministic mapping rules: measured metric (sleep, cognition, mood, attention) &rarr; product SKU + formulation variant. Structured document or spreadsheet.</td><td class=\"owner\">Dr. Shweta</td><td class=\"due\">27 Apr 2026</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Share meditation/frequency content folder</td><td>Full folder of audio files (meditation, frequencies, chants) with thumbnail images. Share via Google Drive with Haritha.</td><td class=\"owner\">Komal</td><td class=\"due\">22 Apr 2026</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Patient portal: full protocol view</td><td>Incorporate full combined protocol in patient portal (no P1-only views). Update images. Remove Komal/Shilpa coach images from patient portal — place on public website only.</td><td class=\"owner\">Haritha</td><td class=\"due\">Next sprint</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Clinic/partner onboarding approvals</td><td>Implement Super Admin pending approval queue. Distinguish clinic vs. partner type. Allow admin to update pricing.</td><td class=\"owner\">Haritha / Engineering</td><td class=\"due\">Next sprint</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Engineering: platform setup</td><td>Neuro360Q skeleton + EDF upload flow. care.limitlessbrainlab.com subdomain provisioning. Initial setup for both platforms.</td><td class=\"owner\">Engineering</td><td class=\"due\">4 May 2026</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Brain-age validation cohort plan</td><td>Plan and recruitment strategy for N=100 participants (age bands 20–70) to calibrate cognitive benchmark scores.</td><td class=\"owner\">BT &amp; Komal</td><td class=\"due\">11 May 2026</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>AI coach design document</td><td>Coaching algorithm design, escalation thresholds, LLM provider selection, HIPAA consent requirements.</td><td class=\"owner\">BT &amp; Akshita</td><td class=\"due\">4 May 2026</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n  </div>\n\n  <hr class=\"divider\">\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"padding-top: 8px;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">Section 07 &mdash; Open Questions</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Unresolved Items Requiring Decisions</div>\n    <div class=\"two-col\" style=\"gap: 8px;\">\n      <ul class=\"mini-list\">\n        <li>Exact probability calculation methodology — pending HEVA AI / Axon EEG reverse engineering study (due 4 May 2026)</li>\n        <li>Minimum sample size statistical confidence — 10–15 cases per class will limit initial reliability; validation approach TBD</li>\n        <li>Which LLM provider to use for AI Coach: Claude vs. Gemini (cost vs. performance trade-off)</li>\n        <li>Neuro360Q domain name — \"NeuroQ\" unavailable; confirm final domain with client</li>\n      </ul>\n      <ul class=\"mini-list\">\n        <li>Nootropic rule set not yet received from Dr. Shweta — blocks Phase 3 start</li>\n        <li>Calendar integration for coach scheduling — deferred; exact timeline not confirmed</li>\n        <li>Regulatory approval pathway for clinical deployment of PNDA in India — client responsibility but timeline unknown</li>\n        <li>Brain-age cohort recruitment strategy and consent framework — plan due 11 May 2026</li>\n      </ul>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"footer-band\">\n    <div class=\"footer-left\">\n      <div class=\"f-name\"></div>\n      <div class=\"f-email\">admin@bettroi.com &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; bettroi.com &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; +971 54 714 8580</div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"footer-center\">A5, Techno-Hub, DTEC<br>Dubai Silicon Oasis, UAE</div>\n    <div class=\"footer-right\">\n      <div class=\"f-client\">Neurosense / Limitless Brain Lab</div>\n      <div class=\"f-address\">BTR-2026-NS-REF-01 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; 20 April 2026</div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"footer-confidential\">Internal Working Document — Bettroi FZE &amp; Neurosense / Limitless Brain Lab — Confidential</div>\n</div>\n\n</body>\n</html>\n",
  "isImported": true,
  "sourceFile": "Neurosense_Requirements_Reference_BTR-2026-NS-REF-01.html"
}

## Pricing

```json
{}
```


## Metadata

```json
{
  "importedAt": "2026-05-14T12:28:28.863Z",
  "sourceFile": "Neurosense_Requirements_Reference_BTR-2026-NS-REF-01.html"
```
